workflow: 先围绕可玩的角色搭配定义本阶段体验目标。
用统一 4v4 战斗验证队伍 combo、克制和强度感。
发现缺口后再发散到新技能、装备或属性回调。

taskLines.name: 角色成长体系主线
taskLines.detail: 当前阶段：属性调试已收束，转入可玩的角色搭配玩法 v1；装备和新技能跟随玩法缺口推进。

taskLines.name: 提升agent的数学建模以及分析能力
taskLines.detail: 沉淀数学建模、对比分析、常见函数关系和验证模板，提升 agent 对复杂现象的归因与设计能力。

tasks.name: 低血狂战曲线
tasks.detail: 让狂战士表现为先掉血、进入低血、攻速和吸血增强、反复回升，而不是只看总伤害占比。
successCriteria: 低血阶段攻击节奏提升
强化普攻仍是主要输出
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: 2026-06-24 accept: bloodRage signal report passes 9/9; lowHealthSurvivalSeconds 9.760, postLowAttackRateRatio 2.750, recoveryAfterLow 0.213. Rejected earlier roar/leech buff, accepted owned small-skill opening cooldown and validation-opponent cleanup.

tasks.name: 圣光续航存活
tasks.detail: 验证牧师续航流是否能在危机后把队伍拉回来，而不是治疗数字好看但队友仍然倒下。
successCriteria: 危机后团队血量曲线回升
不靠全局削弱敌人通过
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Current archetype signal report: holySustain passes 6/6, survivorsAt20Seconds 2.063 >= 2, recovery/heal/shield checks pass.

tasks.name: 剧毒绽放兑现
tasks.detail: 毒流需要能看见叠毒、传播、引爆兑现的循环，不能只有DOT占比。
successCriteria: 引爆后能重新进入叠毒循环
tasks.lastEvidence: Accepted from current signal report: poisonBloom passes 8/8; payoff cycle and statusPayoffDamageShare are now valid.

tasks.name: 铁壁对刺杀
tasks.detail: 铁壁已经有反击循环，但面对暗影处决仍可能失效，需要判断是覆盖、数值还是克制关系定义问题。
successCriteria: Improve or redefine shadowExecute matchup expectation
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: 2026-06-24 accept with reframed contract: ironWall signal passes 8/8 with counterTriggers 6.063 and counterDamageShare 0.115; early retaliationBanner experiment was rejected. Matrix now records shadowExecute as a current counter instead of forcing ironWall favored.

tasks.name: 工作台任务表
tasks.detail: 把任务名、细节、优先级、尝试次数和剩余次数做成可查看的数据面板，方便后续skill反馈。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Task board route, API, updater, and test-port validation passed on 3778.

tasks.name: 克制矩阵校准
tasks.detail: 当前所有流派信号大多能过，但 matchup report 还有大量 expected/actual mismatch，需要判断是数值、克制定义还是预期表错误。
successCriteria: 每次只改窄资产或预期合同
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: 2026-06-24 accept: strong/weak expectations recalibrated from normalized 30-game matchup rates using >=53% favored, <=47% weak, middle flex. archetype-matchup-report now says Expectation Mismatches: None in this run.

tasks.name: 战斗引擎统一
tasks.detail: live 动画战斗和 headless combat-sim 仍复制移动、目标、计时器、伤害管线和反应状态，后续容易出现浏览器和报告不一致。
successCriteria: 浏览器竞技场和 Node 报告结果一致
共享逻辑改动后全量回归
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 postponed: full live/headless combat-loop unification is high blast radius. This pass completed narrower consistency fixes: small-skill openingCooldown parity and team simulator reactive counter hook; reports/pages validated. Plan as a separate architecture task.

tasks.name: 组队模拟器反击 hook
tasks.detail: Team simulator 还没有执行新的 reactive counter hook，可能导致招募试玩和流派报告行为不一致。
successCriteria: 组队模拟器能触发反击信号
不启用 stale fallback 技能
铁壁角色在组队模拟器里有可见反击反馈
验证不破坏 team simulator 招募流程
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: 2026-06-24 accept: team_simulator now maps passiveKey, passes counterattack/emitEffectSignal APIs to shared skills, ticks retaliation/counter timers, and triggers reactive effects after damage. node --check passed and /team_simulator/ returned HTTP 200.

tasks.name: 王冠核心反处决
tasks.detail: 王冠核心在固定数值下被暗影处决稳定点杀核心，需保证核心能活到启动窗口或明确改成怕刺杀。
successCriteria: 固定数值 crownCarry vs shadowExecute 不应 0/30
不改底层寻敌/出手规则
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Attempt 2 accepted: tuned crownBloodCharm to shield 84 + 0.52 power, 6s guard and DOT resist, 8.5s cooldown. Full validation passed; crownCarry signal 7/7, carrySurvives10Seconds 1.000, matchup report has no expectation mismatches. Residual risk: fixed-stat fire matchup differs from randomized matrix, so browser feel should be checked.

tasks.name: 技能池扩展与红队平衡
tasks.detail: 补充职业技能和通用技能；用职业预算模型、流派信号、红队/标准队检查新增技能是否破坏现有流派。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Added 15 skills, asset-driven passiveDamageAmp, randomized recruit skill pools; red-team risky candidates 0 after tuning; archetype signals pass and matchup report has no expectation mismatches.

tasks.name: 关键词工作台与职业专属技能
tasks.detail: 调整流派竞技场布局；建立关键词工作台；更新技能设计流程；补充职业专属技能并跑红队/回归。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Arena battle panel moved to top; keyword workbench added and served on test port; skill-kit workflow reads keyword data; 10 class-exclusive skills added; red-team risky candidates 0; archetype signals pass; matchup expectations none.

tasks.name: 矩阵极化归因诊断
tasks.detail: 为每个极端胜率格缓存样本证据，按信号归因强弱原因，汇总每个流派的极端优势/劣势因子；本阶段只诊断不调数值。
successCriteria: 汇总重复优势/劣势标签
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Built matchup evidence cache with 10 compressed samples per ordered cell, generated extreme diagnosis markdown/json, and preserved balance health failure as separate from expectation mismatches. No skill numbers changed.

tasks.name: 确定性生态与关卡原型
tasks.detail: 把低随机战斗的极端胜率诊断改为生态健康审查，并实现5个可枚举体验的敌人关卡。
successCriteria: 标出万金油和无猎物弱队
5关都有多解且不是全组合通过
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-24 accept: Final validation: 5 encounter levels all targetOk; deterministic ecology report flags all-rounder and preyless weak presets instead of failing raw 0/100 outcomes.

tasks.name: 职业特点异常调试
tasks.detail: 基于角色贡献诊断报告，按 budget 调试刺客/牧师/炼金等职业画像异常，保护职业辨识度和既有流派曲线。
tasks.lastEvidence: Closed by current v1 baseline acceptance and ecology-tool validation. Remaining anomalies should become new focused tasks, not keep this broad diagnostic active.

tasks.name: 暗影处决折中回调
tasks.detail: shadowHarvest/shadowCut 上次被过度削弱，需恢复处决窗口，但保护 crownCarry/ironWall/holySustain 不被重新秒穿。
successCriteria: shadowExecute 至少有2个非tempo优势或均势目标
shadowExecute 不应重新成为无脑全能
所有 archetype signal 继续 pass
tasks.lastEvidence: Closed by current v1 baseline acceptance. Shadow execute is no longer treated as base-stat blocker; future issues should be handled through ecology tools or targeted skill tasks.

tasks.name: 职业基础生态平衡
tasks.detail: 用 1v1、2v2、4v4 matrix 校准战士和刺客：战士单挑可强但低 combo 乘区，刺客保留收割但降低无条件爆发。
successCriteria: warrior solo can be high but warrior combo is not dominant
assassin execute requires condition and has front/sustain counters
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-26 accept: Accepted with limitations after 5 tuning attempts: warrior solo is 6/8 and doubleWarrior 4v9; assassin solo 5/8 and assassinWarlock 7/13. Known watch items: berserkerPriest and assassinRanger remain high and should be avoided as early tutorial accidental solvers.

tasks.name: 副定位技能批次平衡
tasks.detail: 基础生态稳定后，检查现有新增技能；补每职业 1-2 个副定位技能，按模板锚点统一 budget、redteam、matrix 平衡。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-27 accept: 2026-06-27 complete: added 9 secondary-position skills and 3 standard presets; build/validate/archetype signals/redteam/matchup matrix rerun. Signals pass, redteam risky candidates 0. bulwarkMarks first version was too weak, revised to dual-ranger setup/payoff team; now 2 prey/5 predators. Broader inherited matrix review remains future standard-ecology work.

tasks.name: 新版十关教学关
tasks.detail: 基础生态稳定后制作带跳关按钮的 10 关教学关，每关验证自然阵型、可过解比例和玩家可理解反馈。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-26 accept: Created tutorial_guide_v3 with 10 levels and prev/next skip controls; added workbench and server route; no dead levels in fixed-stat enumeration.

tasks.name: 职业新流派技能第二批
tasks.detail: 每职业新增1个被动、1个大招、1个小技能；被动必须打开和现有被动不同的新流派入口，并通过红队、信号和矩阵验证。
successCriteria: 每职业新增 passive/ultimate/small 各1个
新被动有明确副流派定位
矩阵结果记录并说明残余风险
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-27 accept: 2026-06-27 complete: added 30 skills, one passive/ultimate/small for every class; added data-driven passiveStat/passiveHealAmp/passiveShieldAmp/passiveDotAmp support; attempt 1 redteam breaker 67.7% was tuned down by narrowing painAnchor/interceptVow/wardenVow/lullabyGuard; final build/validate/signals/redteam/matrix/budget passed with redteam risky candidates 0. Matrix still review from inherited standard-ecology issues.

tasks.name: 决斗战士与冲锋骑士
tasks.detail: 保留旧技能，新增战士决斗流与骑士冲锋流；验证其技能辨识度、红队风险和对旧标准流派的回归影响。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-27 accept: 2026-06-27 complete: kept old skills; added warrior duel skills duelChallenge/duelistOath/singleCombatVerdict and knight charge skills lanceCharge/chargerMomentum/royalCavalryBreak. Added duelTimer decay only. Build/validate/syntax/signals/redteam/matrix/budget ran; existing archetype signals pass; redteam risky candidates 0; top watch candidate 63.1% below breaker threshold.

tasks.name: 属性收益 v2 调试
tasks.detail: 在不改已确认职业基础数值的前提下，调试六大属性每点收益，使主/副属性在1v1、2v2、4v4里形成2-4条有效路线，避免纯坚韧或错属性统治。
successCriteria: 法师等法系不再由武力路线主导
多数职业至少2条有效加点路线
坚韧/韧性不能在大多数职业里无脑第一
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 accept: User confirmed the attribute tuning direction is finally usable. Treat current attribute model as the next-stage baseline instead of continuing attribute-only tuning.

tasks.name: 任务线工作台 v2
tasks.detail: 把原本只服务平衡预算的任务表扩展成通用任务线系统，支持工具、UI、设计、调研等任务，并记录 parentId 发散关系。
successCriteria: 后端支持任务创建和更新
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-29 accept: Implemented task-board v2: generic task types, task lines, parentId branching, backend create/update/attempt APIs, rewritten three-panel frontend. Validation: node --check passed for store/updater/server/frontend JS; updater list and readTaskBoard show schema v2 with tooling line. Server not started in this pass.

tasks.name: 设计装备体系
tasks.detail: 确定装备部位、品质、主属性和副产物。
tasks.outcome: 形成可测试的装备数值体系。
tasks.nextAction: 列出装备部位和每个部位的属性池。
tasks.lastEvidence: Mainline return: equipment design is not the current center. After base-stat anchor and ecology-tool validation, return to the central skill design/balance loop before extending outward again.

tasks.name: 设计加点体系
tasks.detail: 把大属性、小属性、副产物关系落成加点规则。
tasks.outcome: 属性点能转换成当前战斗框架能吃到的小属性。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 accept: Attribute allocation direction is accepted enough to leave design mode and support the next playable composition phase.

tasks.name: 验证不同加点方式可观
tasks.detail: 验证每个角色是否存在一到三条有意义的加点方向。
tasks.outcome: 每个职业至少有可解释的主路线和队伍相关副路线。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 accept: Attribute routes are considered validated for the current stage; future issues should be opened as focused route or skill tasks.

tasks.name: 设计新技能
tasks.detail: 围绕职业主定位和副定位补技能。
tasks.outcome: 新技能要打开新流派入口和属性需求。
tasks.nextAction: Use playable composition needs to decide the next skill batch, not isolated skill ideas.
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 queued behind playable composition v1: next skill design should serve actual team-building gaps.

tasks.name: 平衡新技能
tasks.detail: 用技能预算、流派信号、标准队矩阵、红队和水位线检查新技能。
tasks.outcome: 新技能能产生新选择，但不会拼出无解队。
tasks.nextAction: Run standard-team matrix first, then waterline only if standard goals pass.
tasks.lastEvidence: Queued as the paired center task after new skill design. Balance must validate the new batch, then return to skill design or the next named center instead of extending the task line indefinitely.

tasks.name: 做新的评价标准
tasks.detail: 把装备、加点、技能、队伍配合放进同一套评价流程。
tasks.outcome: Agent 汇报时能说清楚用什么脚本测了什么。
tasks.nextAction: 定义标准测试顺序：基础技能、属性路线、标准队、红队、水位线。

tasks.name: 发现问题后调整属性
tasks.detail: 先归因是技能没吃属性、属性副产物过强、生态缺场景，还是测试方法错误。
tasks.outcome: 属性调整变成受控闭环。
tasks.nextAction: Only reopen if the next playable-composition tests expose a clear attribute-side failure.
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 parked: Current attribute pass is accepted. The adjustment loop is kept as a future safety valve, not the active center.

tasks.name: 标准队生态回调
tasks.detail: 标准队互打矩阵发现 crownCarry、fireBurst、poisonBloom 等流派赢面过宽，需要让独大队有明确天敌，同时保持各自流派信号通过。此任务不处理装备和加点。
successCriteria: 先基于标准队矩阵归因
独大队至少出现明确天敌
调整后重跑标准队矩阵和信号报告
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-29 accept: New ecology-tool skills passed primary standard-team search. Selected teams: anti-crown 100% vs crownCarry, anti-fire 100% vs fireBurst, anti-poison 100% vs poisonBloom, anti-melee 67% vs shadow/blood/lightning. Waterline was run after primary pass; anti-fire is narrow, anti-poison and anti-melee are broad and should be watched.

tasks.name: 暗影刺客生存调试
tasks.detail: 微调暗影刺客隐藏/撤出能力，让非坚韧路线能靠隐藏窗口生存，而不是回到肉毒刺客。
successCriteria: 4v4中10敏/7敏3武/5敏5武至少一个接近最优
10坚韧不再明显压制输出路线
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 accept: Latest Shadow Blade Loop / target-focus pass is considered healthy. Fire mage FX anchoring bug in the showcase was patched separately; no more attribute tuning needed before the next phase.

tasks.name: 可玩的角色搭配玩法 v1
tasks.detail: 属性调试收束后，把已有职业、技能组和预设队伍整理成一个能实际选择、搭配、开战、复盘的核心玩法切片。
tasks.outcome: 玩家能围绕4个位置从多个预设角色/技能组中组队，并通过标准战斗验证 combo、克制和强度感。
tasks.nextAction: 定义第一版可选角色池、预设技能组、队伍槽位和战斗验收路径。
successCriteria: 能选择4人队伍和技能组
战后能看到胜负、关键击杀和基础信号摘要
至少支持多种有效配队而不是单一答案
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 created: Attribute tuning accepted; next phase is playable role-composition gameplay.

tasks.name: 装备词条自动迭代循环
tasks.detail: 建立全局统一装备 asset：定义部位固定属性、词条池、稀有度与词条等级；模拟玩家每轮掉落装备并自动配装，用多样性、流派增强、极端风险、成型速度四个评价函数诊断，再用带属性/装备水表战斗验证；每轮只允许修改装备系统规则，最多 5 次循环，并保留阶段性最佳版本。
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-06-30 accept: Attempt 5 completed combat-proxy comparison. Static best v4 is not combat-stable; v5 fixed-base recovery is the best proxy candidate (+2.1% avg win-rate, 8 regressions), while v3 has fewer regressions but no lift. First-version equipment auto-iteration toolchain is complete; next phase should implement real equipment modifiers rather than keep tuning proxy mapping.

tasks.name: 数学关系知识库 v1
tasks.detail: 为 agent 建造常见数学关系知识库：收益递减、乘算/加算、阈值、窗口、频率-质量转换、采样噪声、对比分析等，方便后续建模和归因调用。
successCriteria: 给出游戏设计对应例子
作为后续 skill/reference 的入口
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-07-01 accept: created design/agent_math_modeling_knowledge_base.md with common math relationships, diagnosis templates, and the rule that attribute points must pass through a conversion function.

tasks.name: 属性/装备共享加成层
tasks.detail: 实现统一 build layer：角色基础值不回推，属性点先经函数换算，再与装备基础数值、词条修正合并到最终战斗单位。
successCriteria: 属性点不直接等于属性
属性模拟脚本接入共享层
装备加成可通过同一层应用
保留基础数值锚点不改
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-07-01 record: Reran the 8 different-team equipment progression simulation against the new enhanced 100-team waterline. End avg/best/worst changed to 0.701/0.917/0.480; enhanced waterline makes weak-team collapse less severe, but fire mage still frequently caps at 1.0 and holy/assassin remain lower in some team sets.

tasks.name: 调试大属性技能急速曲线
tasks.detail: 循环确认火毒成长是否由属性急速触发，试多组奥术/节律技能急速斜率，测试火毒和其他技能流是否被误伤，选择一版落地。
successCriteria: 火毒带加点不轻易封顶
牧师/诗人/炼金等技能流不被明显误伤
tasks.lastEvidence: 2026-07-01 accept: 完整 100 水桶确认 very_hard_cut 最佳：firePoisonAverage 0.929、supportAverage 0.766、capRisk 0.053、hardCap 0；旧参考 hardCap 7，上一刀 hardCap 5。
